---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? What's missing today?

## Proposed Solution
How should it work?

## Which Axiom Does This Serve?
Every feature should align with the Constitution. Which axiom(s) does this support?

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?
